title: Tex Granger: Midnight Rider of the Plains
writer: Arthur Hoerl, Lewis Clay, Harry L. Fraser
actors: Robert Kellard, Peggy Stewart, Robert 'Buzz' Henry
plot: When Tex Granger rides into Three Buttes, Helen Kent persuades him to buy the local newspaper. However, loan shark Rance Carson appoints the bandit Blaze Talbot as town marshal to act as his enforcer and soon the town is in chaos....
